symbols.name: PropertyBag
symbols.summary: PropertyBag is a type-safe dictionary abstraction for key-value pairs, with support for type conversion, change notification, and basic merging/cloning. Strongly-typed keys are supported optionally via BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.PropertyBagKey%601.

symbols.name: Add(string, object)
symbols.summary: Adds or replaces a value for a key.

syntax.content: public void Add(string key, object value)

symbols.name: Set(string, object)
symbols.summary: Set a value for a key.

syntax.content: public void Set(string key, object value)

symbols.name: Get(string)
symbols.summary: Get the value for a key as object, or null if not found.

symbols.name: Get(string, T)
symbols.summary: Get the value for a key and convert it to the specified type using .To<T>(). Returns default(T) if not found or conversion fails.

syntax.content: public T Get(string key, T defaultValue = default)

symbols.name: TryGet(string, out T)
symbols.summary: Try to get the value for a key and convert it to the specified type. Returns true on success.

syntax.content: public bool TryGet(string key, out T value)

symbols.name: TryGetValue(string, out object)
symbols.summary: Try to get the raw value for a key.

syntax.content: public bool TryGetValue(string key, out object value)

symbols.name: Remove(string)
symbols.summary: Remove a key from the bag.

symbols.name: RemoveAll(Func)
symbols.summary: Remove all keys matching the predicate.

symbols.name: Contains(string)
symbols.summary: Check if the bag contains a key.

symbols.name: Merge(PropertyBag)
symbols.summary: Merge another property bag into this one (overwriting existing keys).

syntax.content: public void Set(PropertyBagKey key, T value)
public T Get(PropertyBagKey key, T defaultValue = default)
public bool TryGet(PropertyBagKey key, out T value)
public object this[string key] { get; set; }

symbols.name: Keys
symbols.summary: Get all keys in the bag.

symbols.name: Values
symbols.summary: Get all values in the bag.
